channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Spurs' Gregg Popovich releases statement as he recovers from stroke
item.description: San Antonio Spurs head coach Gregg Popovich released a statement on Monday night as he continues to recover from the "mild stroke" he suffered last month.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers suspend De'Vondre Campbell after he refused to enter game vs Rams
item.description: San Francisco 49ers linebacker De'Vondre Campbell was suspended for three games after he refused to enter Thursday night's game against the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luka Doncic has triple-double with season-best 45 points in Mavs' 143-133 win over Warriors
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Luka Doncic had his 80th career triple-double with a season-high 45 points along with 13 assists and 11 rebounds, and the Dallas Mavericks beat Klay Thompson's former Golden State Warriors 143-133 on Sunday night in a second visit to Chase Center in just more than a month.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Seahawks QB Geno Smith exits with knee injury against Green Bay and will undergo testing
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — An awkward hit ended quarterback Geno Smith’s night and may have done serious damage to the Seahawks’ playoff chances. Smith left Seattle’s 30-13 loss to Green Bay on Sunday night with a right knee injury and was replaced by Sam Howell midway through the third quarter.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS TALBOTT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Report: Notre Dame and football HC Marcus Freeman agree to long-term extension
item.description: Notre Dame University and football head coach Marcus Freeman have agreed to a long-term contract extension, effectively ending any speculation about him being considered for the Chicago Bears head coaching job.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Joe Burrow's home reportedly broken in to Monday night during game
item.description: According to WLWT, Joe Burrow's Anderson Township, Ohio home was broken into and confirmed by the Hamilton County Sheriff's Office.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation
